patch.value:
## Agent need
Both humans and agents must onboard fast and ship without ceremony; docs must stay accurate and releases must be safe and automatic.

## Delivered surface (pm-u9d0)
docs/ (14 topics) + docs-skills-gate link validation; ONBOARDING.md; daily auto-release workflow (RELEASE_PAT); pm-changelog auto-generation; scripts/ build harness.

## Verified by
docs-accuracy tests and release-readiness specs. Enduring agent-value statement for the docs/release/CI capability; new work lands in pm-u9d0.
As a new teammate or onboarding agent, I want accurate docs, one-command onboarding, and automated date-based releases, so that I can become productive quickly and ship safely

docs-skills-gate validates all relative links (and anchor fragments); a single ONBOARDING.md is the path to productivity; the daily auto-release cuts date-based versions when [Unreleased] is non-empty; CHANGELOG is fully auto-generated from closed items (never hand-edited).
Delivered and maintained by pm-u9d0: docs freshness gates, ONBOARDING, date-based auto-release, and auto-generated changelog; anchor-link + Windows-nightly hardening tracked by open children.
A newcomer becomes productive fast and releases ship safely and automatically.
Docs gates + ONBOARDING + date-based auto-release + auto-changelog shipped.
Delivered and maintained by pm-u9d0: docs freshness gates, ONBOARDING, date-based auto-release, and auto-generated changelog; anchor-link + Windows-nightly hardening tracked by open children.
